title: Smoky Chicken Salad
description: A refreshing salad with smoky grilled chicken, mixed greens, and a tangy lemon dressing.

ingredients.name: Smoky Chicken Breast
ingredients.notes: Grill at 400°F (200°C) for 5-6 minutes per side.

ingredients.name: Chopped Salad Herbs
ingredients.notes: Chopped parsley, dill, or chives work well.

instructions: 2. Grill chicken breast for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
3. Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
4. In a large bowl, combine mixed greens, lemon juice, and French dressing. Toss to coat.
5. Add the sliced chicken to the bowl and toss to combine.
6. Top the salad with chopped salad herbs and serve immediately.
